title: The Unopened Letter
content: While helping clean his grandfather's attic, Leo discovered an old envelope hidden inside a wooden box. The letter had never been opened, even though it was many years old. Curious, his grandfather carefully opened it for the first time. Inside was a friendly note from an old school friend who had moved away decades earlier. Reading the letter brought back many happy memories. Although it had arrived too late, its message still brought joy after all those years.
